nasb.text: The Lord was pleased for His righteousness’ sake To make the law great and glorious.

esv.text: The Lord was pleased, for his righteousness’ sake, to magnify his law and make it glorious.

cnv.text: 耶和華為自己公義的緣故， 喜歡使律法為大為尊。

ccb.text: 耶和华乐意使祂的律法尊大而荣耀， 因为祂行事公义。

csbs.text: 耶和华为自己公义的缘故， 喜爱使律法为大为尊。
